title: スワンSの後に・切り開かれた可能性！

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory was something else! And the
way she accelerated right at the end was
unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I think we just witnessed the birth of a real
promising sprinter! Do you think she'll run miles
too?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Yes! I did it! Heck yeah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I did it... I've found my weapon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meet up with Bamboo Memory after her
impressive performance...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah! Hey, Traineeeeer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I feel like everything's finally come
together!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've found my weapon! I figured out what I'm
good at! I can do it! I can become a super strong,
hardcore racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's seen for herself what she's capable
of, her eyes take on the burning gleam of a new,
hopeful light!
choice_data_list: Let's turn up the heat for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Does that mean...
choice_data_list:
Yep! We're running G1 miles and sprints senior
year!

Yep! We're running G1 miles and sprints senior
year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ohhh...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: OOOHHH! We're running miles and sprints?!
choice_data_list: Let's make you the best at both!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day after the Swan Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So?! Have you decided yet?! What G1 are we
taking on first? Tell me, tell me, tell me!
choice_data_list: Let's aim for the Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race that decides the spring champion of the
sprint will make the perfect stage to show off
Bamboo Memory's skills!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Roger that! Wow, I'm gonna be joining the battle
to become the spring sprint champion...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gwaaah! Why can't it just be spring already?
There's no way I can wait!
choice_data_list: Then take that energy and put it into training!
Then take that energy and put it into training!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You're right!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Then let's train till I drop every day until spring!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You'd better not go easy on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our journey to the top has begun! Next stop, the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen in spring!
